title: Crawling in My Holes
description:
ARCHIVED because Prism's mrpack packer is broken and many files are not properly being included in the modpack. :( 

If you're still interested, download it here:
https://www.mediafire.com/file/g090mta7olhy0i3/Besties_Pack_0.0.7.zip/file
body:
This pack is built around Frostiful, Scorchful, the Serilium suite, Recipe Reshaper, and alot of other mods. There are black powder firearms, horse carts, basic aircraft for exploring the End, the Deeper Dark, BetterNether, BetterEnd, and all of the mods have been configured for as much interplay as possible, to keep the experience consistent and immersive. Probably my favorite part outside of the performance improvements (I clock 3-11ms per tick playing alone, and 10-20ms/tick playing with friends - There is a Friend system and ability to join friends) is that structures spawn far less often thanks to Sparse Structures. They are about ten times as rare, except villages, which are twenty times as rare. 

I highly recommend allocating at minimum 4Gb of RAM. If you can go up to 8 or more, that would be even better.
